parameters.content:
## RAG Financial Intelligence — Week 2 Project

**One-liner:** My RAG app helps investment analysts answer financial questions from SEC filings + FMP company profiles via webhook API with >90% faithfulness and <15s latency.

**RAG Stack:**
- Corpus: FMP Company Profile + SEC EDGAR metadata (~1 doc per ticker)
- Chunking: Recursive 512 chars / 50 overlap
- Embedding: OpenAI text-embedding-3-small (1536-dim)
- Store: n8n In-Memory (per-ticker memoryKey: financial_rag_TICKER)
- Retrieval: Top-4 semantic chunks (retrieve-as-tool)
- Generation: GPT-4o with citation instructions

**Endpoints:**
1. POST /webhook/rag-ingest {ticker} → index docs
2. POST /webhook/rag-query {ticker, question} → AI answer

## Flow 1: RAG Document Ingestion

POST /webhook/rag-ingest
Body: { "ticker": "AAPL" }

Pipeline:
1. Validate ticker symbol
2. Fetch FMP company profile (description, sector, CEO, valuation)
3. Fetch SEC EDGAR CIK for filing links
4. Build full-text financial document
5. Chunk → Embed → Store in per-ticker vector store

Setup: Add OpenAI credential

## Flow 2: RAG Q&A Agent

POST /webhook/rag-query
Body: { "ticker": "AAPL", "question": "What are the main risk factors?" }

Pipeline:
1. Parse ticker + question
2. AI Agent retrieves top-4 chunks from indexed vector store
3. GPT-4o generates cited answer grounded in retrieved docs
4. Returns JSON with answer + source metadata

Note: Run /rag-ingest first for the ticker!

parameters.jsCode:
const ticker = $('Validate Ingest Ticker').first().json.ticker;
const raw = $('FMP Company Profile').first().json;
const prof = Array.isArray(raw) ? (raw[0] || {}) : (raw || {});
const secData = $('SEC EDGAR CIK Lookup').first().json;
const cikSrc = secData?.hits?.hits?.[0]?._source || {};
const cik = (cikSrc.entity_id || '').toString().replace(/^CIK/i, '');
const fmt = (n) => n != null ? String(n) : 'N/A';
const fmtB = (n) => n ? '$' + (Number(n)/1e9).toFixed(2) + 'B' : 'N/A';
const doc = '# ' + fmt(prof.companyName) + ' (' + ticker + ') - Financial Intelligence Document\n\n' +
  '## Company Overview\n' +
  'Ticker: ' + ticker + '\n' +
  'Company Name: ' + fmt(prof.companyName) + '\n' +
  'Exchange: ' + fmt(prof.exchangeShortName || prof.exchange) + '\n' +
  'Sector: ' + fmt(prof.sector) + '\n' +
  'Industry: ' + fmt(prof.industry) + '\n' +
  'Country: ' + fmt(prof.country) + '\n' +
  'CEO: ' + fmt(prof.ceo) + '\n' +
  'Full-Time Employees: ' + fmt(prof.fullTimeEmployees) + '\n' +
  'Website: ' + fmt(prof.website) + '\n' +
  'IPO Date: ' + fmt(prof.ipoDate) + '\n' +
  'SEC CIK: ' + cik + '\n\n' +
  '## Business Description\n' + (prof.description || 'No description available.') + '\n\n' +
  '## Market and Valuation Data\n' +
  'Current Price: $' + fmt(prof.price) + '\n' +
  'Market Capitalization: ' + fmtB(prof.mktCap) + '\n' +
  'Beta (market sensitivity): ' + fmt(prof.beta) + '\n' +
  'Volume Average: ' + fmt(prof.volAvg) + '\n' +
  'Last Dividend Paid: $' + fmt(prof.lastDiv) + '\n' +
  'DCF Fair Value (FMP model): $' + fmt(prof.dcf) + '\n' +
  'DCF vs Market Price Differential: ' + fmt(prof.dcfDiff) + '%\n\n' +
  '## SEC Filing References\n' +
  'CIK: ' + cik + '\n' +
  '10-K Filings URL: https://www.sec.gov/cgi-bin/browse-edgar?action=getcompany&CIK=' + cik + '&type=10-K\n' +
  'XBRL Company Facts: https://data.sec.gov/api/xbrl/companyfacts/CIK' + String(cik).padStart(10,'0') + '.json\n\n' +
  '## Investment Risk Context\n' +
  fmt(prof.companyName) + ' operates in the ' + fmt(prof.sector) + ' sector (' + fmt(prof.industry) + ').\n' +
  'Beta of ' + fmt(prof.beta) + ' indicates ' + (parseFloat(prof.beta || 1) > 1 ? 'above-average' : 'below-average') + ' market sensitivity.\n' +
  'Dividend policy: last dividend $' + fmt(prof.lastDiv) + ' per share.\n' +
  'FMP DCF model implies ' + (parseFloat(prof.dcfDiff || 0) > 0 ? 'undervaluation' : 'overvaluation') + ' of ' + Math.abs(parseFloat(prof.dcfDiff || 0)).toFixed(1) + '% vs current price.\n' +
  'Document generated: ' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
return [{ json: { ticker, document: doc, companyName: prof.companyName || ticker, cik, sector: prof.sector || 'N/A' } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: "indexed", ticker: $json.ticker, company: $json.companyName, memoryKey: "financial_rag_" + $json.ticker, chunking: "recursive_512_50", embeddingModel: "text-embedding-3-small", message: "Financial docs embedded. Now query via POST /webhook/rag-query with {ticker, question}" }) }}

options.systemMessage: You are an expert financial analyst specializing in SEC filings and company fundamentals. Use the Financial Filing Knowledge Base tool to retrieve relevant information before answering. Structure every answer as: (1) Direct answer, (2) Evidence from retrieved documents with specific citations, (3) Key caveats or limitations. If documents are not found in the knowledge base, tell the user to first POST to /webhook/rag-ingest with the ticker symbol.

parameters.toolDescription: Search indexed SEC filings, company profiles, business descriptions, risk factors, valuation data, and financial metrics for the queried stock ticker. Always use this tool first before answering financial questions about a specific company.
